title: polygala tenuifolia var. uncinata
intro: Polygala tenuifolia var. uncinata, also known as Yuan Zhi or Chinese Sensorium, is a plant species used in traditional Chinese medicine. It is valued for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects, which are believed to support mental clarity, memory, and overall well-being. The plant is used to address a range of health issues, including stress, anxiety, insomnia, and cognitive decline, as well as to promote relaxation and enhance mood. Polygala tenuifolia var. uncinata is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
